description_long: This is a single-family detached house set within a rectangular plot bordered by hedges and trees. The house features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, and a front-facing garage attached to the right side. The front yard includes a manicured lawn, a paved driveway, and ornamental trees, while the backyard is enclosed by tall coniferous trees and additional landscaping. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and a decorative overhang. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof. The property is surrounded by lush greenery, providing privacy and a suburban residential feel.
description: A gable-roofed suburban house with a front garage, manicured lawn, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, side windows, and the continuation of the hedge and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with tall coniferous trees, backyard landscaping, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side of the house, extensive hedges, and a large tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and decorative overhang
